title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BALADING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6607 / 53 OG No. 17, 5518 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1769, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BALADING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Balading in the Municipality of Cuyo, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Balading.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
